violations.text: Dessert display cooler located in the front area was not in good repair (ambient of 55F). Per interview with PIC, establishment plans on using cooler for flan, tres leches, and ect - which require refrigeration of 41F or below. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Menu lacks an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Establishment lacks sanitizer (chlorine) for 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration units. Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/11/2026

Dessert display cooler located in the front area was not in good repair (ambient of 60F). Per interview with PIC, establishment plans on using cooler for flan, tres leches, and ect - which require refrigeration of 41F or below. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation old tape/adhesive residue. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
Inspector observed hood vent/lights in poor repair (vent and lights did not turn on). PIC has work order in place. New Violation. Correct By: 04/27/2026
